name: inMobile REST API
description:
# Introduction

This document is a technical description of our REST API used for external systems to send sms messages and to retrieve a status for each sms message sent and to maintain lists and blacklists.

In order to call our API, you need an api key. Log in to your account at https://mm.inmobile.dk, go to the "API" menu section and your api key will be available here.

NOTE: It is required for clients to support tls 1.2 or higher.


# Firewall openings

This is relevant for status callbacks and incoming SMS messages.

You can expect callbacks from one of the following IP ranges:

* 46.36.205.80/28
* 185.221.37.96/28

These are also the ip addresses which will be used for api.inmobile.com and mm.inmobile.dk - ensure access to these 2 ranges are opened in your firewall.
